bank_fraud_alert.label: Bank fraud alert phishing
bank_fraud_alert.text: Chase Fraud Alert: We detected suspicious activity on your debit card. Confirm your account now at https://chase-security-check-login.co/verify or your account will be suspended today.

dmv_impersonation.label: DMV impersonation
dmv_impersonation.text: DMV Notice: Your vehicle registration has been suspended. Pay the outstanding penalty within 24 hours at https://ca-dmv-renewal-help.top/pay to avoid extra fees.

gift_card_scam.label: Gift card scam
gift_card_scam.text: Hey this is the CEO. I need you to buy 6 Apple gift cards right now for client thank-you gifts. Scratch them and text me the codes before the next meeting.

package_delivery_scam.label: Package delivery scam
package_delivery_scam.text: USPS: Your package could not be delivered. Update your address now: http://usps-delivery-help.top/track/88421

boss_impersonation.label: Boss impersonation
boss_impersonation.text: Can you handle a quick wire for me before lunch? I am stuck in meetings, so keep this private and send the payment confirmation as soon as it is done.

fake_password_reset.label: Fake password reset
fake_password_reset.text: Microsoft password reset request. Review the request and sign in now at https://microsoft-secure-reset-login.co/review to keep your mailbox active.

benign_newsletter.label: Benign newsletter
benign_newsletter.text: GitHub Monthly Digest: Here are the repositories you starred this month, plus a few security articles from the official GitHub blog.

normal_banking_notification.label: Normal banking notification
normal_banking_notification.text: Your checking account statement is ready. Sign in to your usual mobile app or visit the bank website you normally use.

safe_personal_text.label: Safe personal text
safe_personal_text.text: Running 10 minutes late. I will meet you at the coffee shop on Main Street.

borderline_suspicious.label: Borderline suspicious
borderline_suspicious.text: We noticed a sign-in attempt. If this was not you, check your account from the official app and update your password there.
